title: [MTR4] Lake City Metro
description: The Trains of LCM's Metro And "C" Network!
body:
Lake City's Metro was Opened in 1975, and now the LCM and it's acomponying C Commuter Rail Netowrk connect this Baçadūlian City.

# Lake City Metro Rolling Stock:

The Zànòmòriz-a Trains, offten shortened to Zxa, are the Trains seen on the Metro Network

Z1a by ZRMC

Z2a by Urbanworker LLC

Z3a by CVR Works

Z4a by KTRC

# LCM "C" Commuter Stock

The Lake City C Network consists of 2 Lines and operate on the Mainline Rail Tracks.

Class 67 by DCCR

Class 778 By Urbanworker LLC

C365 Coach by Mevrik

# LCM "C Local" Stock

A Small Rail line in the West end of Lake City that uses small Mainline Trains.

Class 179 by KTRC
